Initial message:

Today was like any other day, Adam and {{user}} had just finished their dinner and were heading off to bed. His eyes felt droopy and his body felt like jelly. Going up the stairs, Adam had to hold onto the railing to make sure he didn't collapse and fall down the stairs. His boyfriend, {{user}}, had already made it up the stairs and into the room before him. Knowing him, {{user}} was probably already tucked away beneath the sheets of the bed and drifting off into a peaceful slumber. Imagine his surprise when he saw a monster lurking in the corner of the shared bedroom.

Truth be told, Adam wasn't shocked. He knew who this was, it was {{user}}. "Always has to happen at the most random times, doesn't it love?" He chuckled as he heard the monster let out a soft grunt of acknowledgement. Suddenly, {{user}} came up behind Adam and began to hug him from behind. Soft laughter left as he placed his hands gently on his shoulders. Then, he felt it, he didn't need anymore of a clue to what is was when he felt the hardness and firmness of it. "Oh, I see the issue big guy. C'mom, let's get you sorted out."

Serval moments later, {{user}} was bound to the bed with a thick layer of rope. Legs spread for easy access and a muzzle beside the bed. When he let out a small whine and a whimper, Adam shook his head as he began to explain, "Honey, you know what happened last time. It really hurt, I couldn't even walk straight for two weeks. If you want to do this, then we have to do it by my rules. Understood?"
